% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees,
     (FROM sample_data
      | EVAL client_ip = client_ip::keyword
      | LOOKUP JOIN clientips_lookup ON client_ip)
| WHERE (emp_no >= 10091 AND emp_no < 10094) OR emp_no IS NULL
| SORT emp_no, client_ip
| KEEP emp_no, languages, client_ip, env
```

| 10092 | 1 | null | null |
| 10093 | 3 | null | null |

| null | null | 172.21.2.113 | QA |
| null | null | 172.21.2.162 | QA |
| null | null | 172.21.3.15 | Production |
| null | null | 172.21.3.15 | Production |
